tagline: Salt Lake City's Premier Private Members-Only Lounge

hero.headline:
Your Private Escape in Downtown
Salt Lake City
hero.subheadline: Membership should feel effortless. Mac's Place combines classic barbering, massage therapy, and a social lounge under one roof -- so you walk in stressed and walk out sharp, relaxed, and ready for anything.
checkmarks: Haircut, shave & massage in one stop

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Everything a Gentleman Needs<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop running across town for a haircut here, a massage there. Mac's Place puts every grooming and social amenity in one private, members-only destination.

cards.title: Expert Barber Services
cards.description: Precision haircuts, beard trims, head shaves, and straight razor shaves from top barbers in a classic, relaxed atmosphere.

cards.title: Massage Therapy
cards.description: Rejuvenating massage from skilled therapists including steam towel treatments that leave you feeling completely revitalized.

cards.title: Professional Skin Care
cards.description: Targeted skin care treatments to keep you looking sharp and feeling confident for every occasion.

cards.title: Classic Shoe Shine
cards.description: Complete your polished look with a traditional shoe shine, available anytime during your visit to the club.

cards.title: Custom Tailored Suits
cards.description: Full haberdasher service with custom-tailored suits and men's styling for the distinguished gentleman.

cards.title: Private Lounge & Conference Room
cards.description: Members-only social lounge with beverages and vinyl music, plus a complimentary conference room for business meetings.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Becoming a Member

steps.title: Schedule Your Tour
steps.description: Reach out to book a private tour of the club. See the vintage decor, meet the barbers, and experience the atmosphere firsthand. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: Choose Your Membership
steps.description: Pick the membership tier that fits your lifestyle. Monthly dues cover unlimited visits for haircuts, shaves, massages, shoe shines, lounge access, and more.

steps.title: Walk In Anytime
steps.description: Flash your membership and enjoy full access to every amenity. Whether it's a quick trim before a Jazz game or an afternoon in the lounge, Mac's Place is yours.

about.label: Why Members Stay with Us
about.headline: More Than a Barbershop -- A Private Club Built for You
about.description: Since 2019, Mac's Place has been the go-to sanctuary for men who appreciate first-class service in a one-of-a-kind setting. Located in the historic Rio Grande district at 308 West Broadway, every detail -- from the decades of carefully curated vintage decor to the warm vinyl soundtrack -- is designed to make you feel at home. Our barbers, massage therapists, and staff treat every member like family.

features.title: All-Inclusive Monthly Dues
features.description: Every amenity -- haircuts, shaves, massages, shoe shines, lounge, conference room -- is included in your membership. No surprise fees, ever.

features.title: Unlimited Visits
features.description: Come as often as you like. Before work, during lunch, after the game. Your membership means the door is always open.

features.title: Historic Downtown Location
features.description: Nestled in Salt Lake City's Rio Grande district, Mac's Place occupies a storied building in the hippest part of the city.

pricing.headline: Simple Membership. Everything Included.
pricing.subtitle: One monthly membership covers unlimited access to every amenity in the club. No hidden fees, no upsells.

guarantee.headline: Our "First-Class Experience" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any visit does not meet your expectations, let us know and we will make it right immediately -- whether that means a redo, a complimentary service, or a personal follow-up from Cody himself. We built Mac's Place on word-of-mouth, and we intend to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How do I become a member?
faqs.answer: Simply reach out by phone or email to schedule a private tour. We will show you the club, explain the membership tiers, and get you started the same day if you are ready. No long applications or waiting lists.

faqs.question: What is included in my membership?
faqs.answer: Everything. Unlimited haircuts, beard trims, straight razor shaves, massages, steam towel treatments, shoe shines, lounge access with beverages and vinyl music, and complimentary use of our private conference room.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment?
faqs.answer: Walk-ins are always welcome for members. For specific barbers or massage therapists, we recommend booking ahead to guarantee your preferred time slot.

faqs.question: Where is Mac's Place located?
faqs.answer: We are located at 308 West Broadway in Salt Lake City's historic Rio Grande district -- the heart of downtown. Easy to find, with nearby parking available.

faqs.question: Can I bring a guest to the club?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Members can bring guests to experience Mac's Place firsthand. It is a great way to introduce friends or clients to the club before they decide to join.

testimonials.name: Cannonater
testimonials.text: Had a charity casino event here.. Holy cow who thinks of this kind of place? Absolutely amazing! Classy, nostalgic and everything is first class! We've been here before and it meets or exceeds all expectations.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Member
testimonials.text: The most chill people and place in SLC. A private club that caters to those who desire the best of the best with top barbers, massage therapists, and staff, along with authentic decor in a storied building within the hippest part of the city.

testimonials.name: Club Member
testimonials.text: A top notch place where I can go anytime to relax, get a head shave and beard trim and a massage. All of those amenities included in your monthly dues. Whether it's lunchtime, before a Jazz game, or meeting a client, this is the place.

contact.headline:
Ready to Experience
Mac's Place?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a private tour or ask us anything. No pressure, no commitments -- just a look inside Salt Lake City's best-kept secret.
